programme.title: Boston Blue
programme.desc: When a captured serial killer hints at the whereabouts of a missing child, Danny teams up with a familiar ally in a tense race against time; health scares and long-kept family secrets surface, forcing members of the team to confront personal truths.

programme.title: The Princess Bride
programme.desc: A fairy tale adventure about a beautiful young woman and her one true love. He must find her after a long separation and save her. They must battle the evils of the mythical kingdom of Florin to be reunited with each other. Based on the William Goldman novel "The Princess Bride" which earned its own loyal audience.

programme.title: Sugar & Vice: A Hannah Swensen Mystery
programme.desc: Hannah finds a body at the grand re-opening of the Lake Eden Inn. When a storm traps everyone inside, Hannah must find the culprit before the road clears and the killer escapes.

programme.title: Somebody's Hiding Something
programme.desc: During a violent home invasion in San Diego, a masked intruder shoots criminal defense lawyer Tim MacNeil in the head. And though investigators suspect a connection to his work, a composite sketch ultimately reveals a sinister plot closer to home.

programme.title: Somebody's Hiding Something
programme.desc: Police find beauty salon owner Dana Satterfield murdered in the storeroom of her South Carolina shop; their investigation spans ten years before a chance encounter can convince a key witness to reveal what he knows.

programme.title: Mary Makes It Easy

programme.title: Cash Cab
programme.desc: Unsuspecting members of the public climbing into an apparently normal taxicab, only to find themselves on national television, with a chance to win a small fortune; hosted by Adam Growe.

programme.title: Question Period
programme.desc: Discussions with key players in Canadian politics.

programme.title: Heavy Rescue: 401
programme.desc: When Sonny needs to pull off an urgent recovery, he turns to an unexpected source for help; a tight recovery puts Duncan right up against a live lane of traffic; Gary's crew takes on the last big rollover of the winter.

programme.title: Harry Potter and the Deathly Hallows: Part 2
programme.desc: A clash between good and evil awaits as young Harry, Ron and Hermione prepare for a final battle against Lord Voldemort. Harry has grown into a steely lad on a mission to rid the world of evil. The friends must search for the Horcruxes that keep the dastardly wizard immortal. Harry and Voldemort meet at Hogwarts Castle for a showdown where the forces of darkness may finally meet their match.
